title: chore: trim unused files and tidy the prompt template
body: Remove artifacts that shipped by accident (assets/sample.diff and the stale .env.example) and shorten the prompt template so the action's footprint stays minimal. Touches README.md, entrypoint.sh, and src/pr_pilot/main.py alongside the deletions.
commit_messages: chore: refine template, trim out unused file like sample.diff or .env.example
